name: apple1
text:
Is it a magic showcase?!
Then let me show you something amazing too!

name: apple2
text:
Shocking!
Sherry's magic turns out to be [Super Strength]!

name: cry
text:
No matter how hard I try, I can never pretend to be normal...
Isn't that sad?
Waah waah waah...

name: serious
text:
Hey hey~! I'm Tachibana Sherry.
Wherever there's a case, there I'll be!
Just leave everything to this great detective!

name: think_point1
text: Let's all cheer up and start the trial!
